'''yodhazaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:jejunogastric|jejunogastric]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jejunogastric|jejunogastric]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yodhazaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhazithi|yodhazithi]] || [[word:yodhaziji|yodhaziji]] || [[word:yodhazishi|yodhazishi]] || [[word:yodhaziki|yodhaziki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhazuthuthu|yodhazuthuthu]] || [[word:yodhazujuju|yodhazujuju]] || [[word:yodhazushushu|yodhazushushu]] || [[word:yodhazukuku|yodhazukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhazuthu|yodhazuthu]] || [[word:yodhazuju|yodhazuju]] || [[word:yodhazushu|yodhazushu]] || [[word:yodhazuku|yodhazuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhazufthuf|yodhazufthuf]] || [[word:yodhazufjuf|yodhazufjuf]] || [[word:yodhazufshuf|yodhazufshuf]] || [[word:yodhazufkuf|yodhazufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhazethe|yodhazethe]] || [[word:yodhazeje|yodhazeje]] || [[word:yodhazeshe|yodhazeshe]] || [[word:yodhazeke|yodhazeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhazothotho|yodhazothotho]] || [[word:yodhazojojo|yodhazojojo]] || [[word:yodhazoshosho|yodhazoshosho]] || [[word:yodhazokoko|yodhazokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhazotho|yodhazotho]] || [[word:yodhazojo|yodhazojo]] || [[word:yodhazosho|yodhazosho]] || [[word:yodhazoko|yodhazoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhazofthof|yodhazofthof]] || [[word:yodhazofjof|yodhazofjof]] || [[word:yodhazofshof|yodhazofshof]] || [[word:yodhazofkof|yodhazofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhazïfthïf|yodhazïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfjïf|yodhazïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfshïf|yodhazïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfkïf|yodhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhazïfthïfthïf|yodhazïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfjïfjïf|yodhazïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfshïfshïf|yodhazïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfkïfkïf|yodhazïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhazïfthïf|yodhazïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfjïf|yodhazïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfshïf|yodhazïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfkïf|yodhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhazïfthïf|yodhazïfthïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfjïf|yodhazïfjïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfshïf|yodhazïfshïf]] || [[word:yodhazïfkïf|yodhazïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yodhazæthæ|yodhazæthæ]] || [[word:yodhazæjæ|yodhazæjæ]] || [[word:yodhazæshæ|yodhazæshæ]] || [[word:yodhazækæ|yodhazækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yodhazathatha|yodhazathatha]] || [[word:yodhazajaja|yodhazajaja]] || [[word:yodhazashasha|yodhazashasha]] || [[word:yodhazakaka|yodhazakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yodhazatha|yodhazatha]] || [[word:yodhazaja|yodhazaja]] || [[word:yodhazasha|yodhazasha]] || [[word:yodhazaka|yodhazaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yodhazafthaf|yodhazafthaf]] || [[word:yodhazafjaf|yodhazafjaf]] || [[word:yodhazafshaf|yodhazafshaf]] || [[word:yodhazafkaf|yodhazafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:yodhazasha|yodhazasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhazshësha|yodhazshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhazrosha|yodhazrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhazmusha|yodhazmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhazyasha|yodhazyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhaznkshësha|goyodhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhaznkrosha|goyodhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhaznkmusha|goyodhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhaznkyasha|goyodhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:yodhadhazasha|yodhadhazasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhadhazshësha|yodhadhazshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhadhazrosha|yodhadhazrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhadhazmusha|yodhadhazmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhadhazyasha|yodhadhazyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhadhaznkshësha|goyodhadhaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhadhaznkrosha|goyodhadhaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhadhaznkmusha|goyodhadhaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhadhaznkyasha|goyodhadhaznkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:yedhæzasha|yedhæzasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yedhæzshësha|yedhæzshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yedhæzrosha|yedhæzrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yedhæzmusha|yedhæzmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yedhæzyasha|yedhæzyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyedhæznkshësha|goyedhæznkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyedhæznkrosha|goyedhæznkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyedhæznkmusha|goyedhæznkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyedhæznkyasha|goyedhæznkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:yodhfazasha|yodhfazasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:yodhfazshësha|yodhfazshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yodhfazrosha|yodhfazrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yodhfazmusha|yodhfazmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yodhfazyasha|yodhfazyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyodhfaznkshësha|goyodhfaznkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyodhfaznkrosha|goyodhfaznkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyodhfaznkmusha|goyodhfaznkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goyodhfaznkyasha|goyodhfaznkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|66806d6}}
